Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed following SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Agreed when preceded by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Accept in variants that end with acceptance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Declined within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to be followed by another SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-reviewer assignments
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases where the variant includes SW-Reviewer No Response later in the sequence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response occurs

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late and SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of Assign a Different Editor
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Assign a Different Editor' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to Manuscript Export Succeeded in accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants where AE recommendation is required
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW–Major Revision due in 1 month in major revision paths
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'minimum'}"
